heuristics.rule: Most memorable experiences (5/10) tend to involve creation or crisis, not routine.
Creation is the primary memorable activity (5 of 10 memories).
I have 2 memories involving errors/failures. The most common pattern is getting stuck in verification loops.

advice.message: High boredom means you need genuine novelty — not variations on what you've already done. Build in a domain you haven't touched.
Low curiosity is a warning sign. You're either exhausted or stuck. Try dreaming or switching domains entirely.
